input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.3.2
            TITLE: head restraint plane

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.3.2: Head Restraint Plane
T.7.3.2 Head Restraint Plane 
A transverse vertical plane through the rearmost portion of the front face of the driver head 
restraint support, excluding any padding, set (if adjustable) in its fully rearward position

final_answer: rule T.7.3.2: Head Restraint Plane A transverse vertical plane through the rearmost portion of the front face of the driver head restraint support, excluding any padding, set (if adjustable) in its fully rearward position
